ab: Nikar, matawalay ako miala ko impac, pacaliwen ho kako?
ch: A:Nikar，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Nikar, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Awaay ko mako, o niPanay konini.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Panay’s.

ab: Nga’ay pacaliwen ho kako haw? Halikien to ako a patikol kiso.
ch: A:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Hayda, na alaen.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Ahowiday, patadoen to kako a miahowiday ciPanay.
en: Thank you and thank Panay for me.

ab: O maan ho ko sasaalien iso?
en: May I help you?

ab: O papatikol kako tona tosa a tilid.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Hayda, o maan ho ko sasaalien iso?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: O mamicalw kako to tolo a tilid.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Hayda, haratengen tolo a romi’ad patikolen a patayni.
ch: A:好的。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Iraay ho ko sasipasip iso.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Mapatikolay to ako inacila.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Mana malahedaw koya sasipasip no mako.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Nipacaliwan iso ciKacaw?
en: Did you lend it to Kacaw?

ab: Cowa to kaharateng no mako, hena licayen ho ako cingra.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Pacaliwen no mako to sasipasip kiso.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Panay, nipacaliwan niKacaw to kafang kiso?
en: Panay, did Kacaw lend you this coat?

ab: Cowa, o ni’acaan no wina ako to hamako konini.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Mahecad to niKacaw a kafang.
en: Kacaw’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: O kohetingay a kafang ko niKacaw, cowa kahecad ko cengel niyam.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Panay, micaliway to payci niKacaw kiso?
en: Panay, did you borrow money from Kacaw?

ab: Hai, o papatikolen no mako cingra anini, matawalay no mako a mihawikid ko payci.
ch: W:是的，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Ya hacowaen to iso a patikol?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Anocila hanto ako a patikol cingra.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Hayda, sowal hanto ako ciKacaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Kacaw for you.
